title: Ocean Fish Friends
description: A simple coloring page featuring various ocean fish with clear outlines for young children to color and learn about marine life.
instructions: Color the different fish using your favorite colors! Try to use colors that real fish might have in the ocean.

content.image: A simple underwater scene with several types of fish swimming. The image includes a clownfish, angelfish, starfish, pufferfish, and seahorse, all with simple black outlines on white background.
learningFacts: The ocean is home to thousands of different fish species
Some fish like clownfish live in sea anemones
Seahorses swim upright and can change colors
Starfish are not actually fish - they're sea stars!
